destinations.description: Transfer here if the caller is a PROSPECT: asking about touring/viewing, scheduling, availability, rent, moving in, or an application/application status for a property they do not yet rent.
Transfer here if the caller is a current TENANT/resident: maintenance, repairs, rent payment, lease questions, or any current-resident concern.
Transfer here if the caller is a property OWNER: property management services, renting out their property, or investment/owner consultation.
Transfer here ONLY if the caller explicitly wants to become a VENDOR / approved service provider (a vendor application). Not for general maintenance mentions.
Transfer here if intent is unclear/general, the caller is vague, or they ask for Debbie / a manager / a specific person / a human. This assistant takes a message for the team.
